title: Project — Story Writing
topics: narrative tenses · story structure · connectors · vivid writing
description: Projekt: napsat krátký příběh v angličtině.
notes: Narrative tenses: past simple (events) + past continuous (background) + past perfect (before)
✓ Show, don't tell: 'Her hands trembled.' (not: 'She was scared.')
✓ Short sentences = tension: He ran. The door slammed. Silence.
✓ Use senses: smell, sound, touch, taste — not just sight
✓ Strong verbs: sprinted, whispered, glared (not: ran fast, said quietly)

examples.en: It was past midnight when I heard the noise.
examples.cz: Bylo po půlnoci, když jsem uslyšel/a ten hluk.

examples.en: She had never seen him before — yet something felt familiar.
examples.cz: Nikdy ho předtím neviděla — přesto něco působilo povědomě.

examples.en: The smell of coffee filled the room.
examples.cz: Místnost se naplnila vůní kávy. (smyslový detail)

examples.en: 'Are you sure about this?' she whispered.

quiz.sentence: She ___ (sit) at her desk when the phone rang. (past cont.)
By the time he arrived, she ___ (leave) already. (past perf.)
'Show don't tell': Instead of 'He was angry', write: 'He ___ his fist.'

tasks: 1. Expand your story to 200 words, adding dialogue and sensory details
2. Write a second version of the same story from a different character's perspective
3. Write a story with a twist ending — the last sentence should surprise the reader
